subject: Invoice overcharge
description: Please check my latest invoice — I was charged twice for the same plan period.

subject: Cannot login to account
description: Can't access my account. The login page says my password is wrong but I just reset it.

subject: Feature request for dark mode
description: Please add dark mode to the dashboard — it would greatly improve usability at night.

subject: App crashes on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after the splash screen on Android 14.

subject: Bug in CSV export
description: The CSV export contains duplicate rows when filtering by date range.

subject: Refund not received after cancellation
description: I cancelled my subscription 10 days ago and still haven't received the refund to my account.

subject: 2FA SMS code not arriving
description: The two-factor authentication SMS code is not being delivered to my phone number.

subject: Dashboard blank screen after update
description: The main dashboard page shows a blank screen after the last update was applied.

subject: Bulk ticket assignment feature request
description: It would be helpful to have a bulk ticket assignment option available for team leads.

subject: Search regression after v2.4 release
description: The search filter stopped returning any results after the v2.4 release last Tuesday.

subject: Account locked after failed login attempts
description: My account was locked after too many failed login attempts. Please unlock it immediately.

subject: API server timeout in production
description: All API requests are timing out after 30 seconds — production is affected for all users.

subject: Wrong tax rate on recent invoice
description: The invoice shows a tax rate that doesn't match my registered country's VAT rules.

subject: File upload fails for large attachments
description: Uploading attachments larger than 2 MB always fails with a 500 internal server error.

subject: Incorrect ticket count in analytics
description: The ticket count on the analytics page is off by 12 compared to the actual list view.

subject: Production is completely down — critical outage
description: Critical: our entire tenant is down. No users can log in or access any data right now.

subject: SSO via SAML broken after IdP migration
description: Single sign-on via SAML is broken after the identity provider migration performed last week.

subject: CSV import silently stops at row 200
description: Bulk import via CSV silently stops processing after exactly 200 rows with no error message.

subject: Duplicate charge on billing cycle
description: My card was charged twice in the same billing cycle for the same subscription plan.

subject: General inquiry about priority algorithm
description: I have a general question about how the automatic ticket priority algorithm determines urgency.
